input.content: What's the weather in Paris? Use the get_weather tool.

content.text:
We are being asked for the weather in Paris. We should call the get_weather tool with the city parameter set to "Paris".
 Let's use the exact format required.
I'll check the weather in Paris using the get_weather tool:

tools.description: Get current weather for a city. Returns temperature and conditions.
tools.name: get_weather
